label: Derived avoided-loss per MW (DEPCOM 92 MW)
interpretation: Avoided loss (not incurred damage) per nameplate MW; falls inside the ALL-8 flood failure-unit envelope and near 30% of the primary electrical bucket, consistent with flood damaging PCS/inverters/switchgear rather than modules.

label: Derived flood loss per MW DC across portfolio (13-yr aggregate)
interpretation: 13-year portfolio aggregate spread over 92 GW DC; near-zero per MW. Confirms flood is a rare, small-share peril in aggregate, not a per-event severity.

label: Valdora 15-MW flood physical damage per MW (zero-loss anchor)
interpretation: Genuine measured zero: a well-elevated site took a major flood with no physical damage. Anchors the lower bound of the flood damage range.
